ladder.label: B1 center-in-footprint
ladder.question: terminal cube center within the tray outer footprint (2D, no rim)

ladder.label: B2 footprint-overlap
ladder.question: terminal cube footprint overlaps tray footprint >= 0.5 (2D, no rim)

ladder.label: B3 full-inner-containment
ladder.question: terminal cube footprint fully inside shrunk inner region (2D, margin)

ladder.label: B4 contained+started-outside
ladder.question: B3 and cube started outside the footprint (2D + initial, no evidence gate)

ladder.label: B5 terminal-3D-containment
ladder.question: csg.is_inside on the LAST frame: shrunk footprint AND rim height (3D, the maximal single-frame terminal predicate)

ladder.label: B6 contained+started-outside+evidence-gated
ladder.question: B4 AND the verifier's fail-closed evidence gate passes (the engineered steelman: matches the structured verifier's verdict profile on this dataset)
